feasibility.evidence: All target files verified via hivexplorer: src/plugin/skill-exposure-map.ts (255 lines, 20 hardcoded skills), src/shared/paths.ts (89 lines, 3 dead exports), bin/hivemind-tools.cjs (1422 lines), src/control-plane/control-plane-registry.ts (268 lines), opencode.json (24 lines, no agents/commands/skills/mcp)

constraints.resource_limits: Each phase ≤5 files, single subagent pass, ~10-20min per slice
constraints.timeline: 8 phases, estimated 3-5 days of focused agent work
constraints.dependencies: Schema-kernel contracts (additive only), SDK supervisor (additive Phase 1), OpenCode SDK tool.schema (Zod)

ambiguity_residual.description: Governance levels — spec says '4 levels' but does not define what each level controls beyond 'no auto-block'. Need level names and scope boundaries.
Tiered injection — 'Tier 1 (project initiation with core docs) → Tier 2 (planning & execution)' is underspecified. What triggers Tier 2 activation? Is it session-based, task-based, or time-based?
Agent template format — spec says 'flat templates with name/description, configured by hivefiver at runtime'. Does this extend AGENTS.md frontmatter or create a new config surface?
Schema authority — spec says 'Follow OpenCode official docs'. The project already has schema-kernel/addons for runtime records. Does the new config schema live in schema-kernel or a new location?

phases.title: Remove dead code and suspect exports from paths.ts
phases.description: Remove ARTIFACTS_DIR, CHECKPOINTS_DIR (0 consumers), STATE_FILES (hiveneuron/hivebrain/brain/anchors — 0 consumers). Audit handoffsDir — if no consumer found in src/, remove it from getEffectivePaths return. Preserve getEffectivePaths signature for consumers that destructure it.
success_criteria: handoffsDir removed from getEffectivePaths if no consumer found (else documented)

delegation_packet.constraints: Remove dead exports only. Do not rename getEffectivePaths. Do not change HIVEMIND_DIR, STATE_DIR, SESSIONS_DIR, GRAPH_DIR, CONFIG_DIR.

phases.title: Audit legacy CLI for removal candidates
phases.description: Deep-read all legacy CLI files. Map: what calls init.handler.ts? What calls sync.ts? Is runtime-assets.ts used by anything besides init.handler.ts? Is bin/hivemind-tools.cjs referenced in package.json scripts or npm lifecycle? Produce a removal decision matrix: safe-to-remove vs needs-replacement vs keep.
success_criteria: Import graph mapped for all 5 legacy files
Removal decision matrix produced (safe / needs-replacement / keep)
Evidence: grep results for all import references
Evidence: package.json scripts section analyzed for bin/hivemind-tools.cjs references

delegation_packet.constraints: Read-only. Do not modify any files. Map import chains, cross-reference with package.json scripts and npm lifecycle hooks.
delegation_packet.return_contract: files_checked, confirmed findings with evidence paths, removal_decision_matrix

phases.title: Define configuration schema for hivefiver
phases.description: Create three new schema-kernel modules following the additive-only convention. config-records.ts: user communication language, document language, expert level (beginner/intermediate/advanced/expert), governance level (4 levels), operation mode (iterative-interactive/research-first/yolo). agent-records.ts: flat agent template (name, description, allowed_tools, model, permissions). skill-injection-records.ts: per-agent per-phase per-task-classification skill rules, mandatory + high-likelihood, two-tier activation. Re-export from schema-kernel/index.ts.
success_criteria: config-records.ts exports HivefiverConfig, ExpertLevel, GovernanceLevel, OperationMode types
agent-records.ts exports AgentTemplate type with name, description, allowed_tools, model, permissions
skill-injection-records.ts exports SkillInjectionRule, SkillTier, TaskClassification types
All types use Zod schemas (tool.schema compatible)

delegation_packet.constraints: Additive only — do not modify existing schema-kernel modules (shared.ts, lifecycle-records.ts, orchestration-records.ts, evidence-records.ts). Follow schema-kernel/AGENTS.md conventions. Use Zod for runtime validation.

phases.title: Create agent definition templates
phases.description: Define default agent templates for the 10 agents: hiveminder, hivefiver, hivehealer, hiveq, hiverd, hivexplorer, hitea, architect, hivemaker, code-skeptic. Each has name, description, allowed_tools (empty = inherit), model (empty = default), permissions (empty = inherit). Export as AGENT_DEFINITIONS constant. Add unit test for schema validation of all 10 agents.
success_criteria: Each template validates against AgentTemplate schema
Agent names match AGENTS.md agent references
Unit test validates all 10 templates pass schema validation

delegation_packet.constraints: Agent names must match the names referenced in AGENTS.md. Do NOT create agent config files — only the definition templates. Use the AgentTemplate type from schema-kernel/agent-records.ts.

phases.title: Replace hardcoded skill injection with configurable system
phases.description: Major refactor of skill injection pipeline. Replace hardcoded SHARED_SKILLS, AGENT_BUNDLES, PURPOSE_CONDITIONAL in skill-exposure-map.ts with configurable rules from schema-kernel/skill-injection-records.ts. Bridge opencode-skill-registry.ts (filesystem discovery) with injection pipeline. Fix MAX_SKILLS from 7 to 3. Remove 20 hardcoded skill names. Remove 11 non-existent skill references. Preserve resolveSkillBundle(), resolveSessionRole(), renderSessionRoleDirective() signatures.
success_criteria: Zero hardcoded skill names in skill-exposure-map.ts
Skill rules loaded from config/schema, not constants
resolveSkillBundle() returns same shape (array of SkillEntry)
messages-transform-adapter.ts compiles and calls refactored functions

delegation_packet.scope: src/plugin/skill-exposure-map.ts (refactor), src/shared/opencode-skill-registry.ts (refactor), src/plugin/messages-transform-adapter.ts (update imports), src/plugin/injection-store.ts (verify no changes needed)
delegation_packet.constraints: Preserve all public function signatures: resolveSkillBundle(), resolveSessionRole(), renderSessionRoleDirective(), SkillEntry, SessionRole. Do NOT break the injection pipeline contract with messages-transform-adapter.ts. MAX_SKILLS must be 3. No hardcoded skill names remain.

phases.title: Create hm-init, hm-doctor, hm-settings tools
phases.description: Create the hivefiver tool surface following the existing tool pattern (index.ts barrel, tools.ts implementations, types.ts Zod schemas). Three tools: hivemind_hm_init (reset defaults via interview, detect greenfield/brownfield, bootstrap .hivemind/), hivemind_hm_doctor (diagnose misconfig, broken skill refs, schema drift), hivemind_hm_setting (step-by-step configuration of groups or all settings). Each tool uses tool.schema (Zod) for args. Register in src/tools/index.ts.
success_criteria: Each tool uses tool.schema (Zod) for arg definitions
tools.ts barrel updated with new exports
hm-doctor checks skill refs, schema drift, broken paths
hm-setting supports individual group or all-groups configuration

delegation_packet.constraints: Follow existing tool pattern from src/tools/runtime/. Use tool.schema (Zod) for all arg definitions. Each tool must return JSON string. Do NOT implement the interview/dialog logic in hm-init — stub it. Do NOT write .hivemind/ files directly — use existing getEffectivePaths.

phases.title: Wire new tools and config into plugin entry
phases.description: Wire the 3 new hivefiver tools into the plugin's tool array. Update tool registration to include createHivemindHmInitTool, createHivemindHmDoctorTool, createHivemindHmSettingTool. Replace hardcoded 'hivefiver' default agent fallback with configurable default from config-records.ts. Update plugin-assembly-smoke test to verify 12 tools (was 9).
success_criteria: 3 new tools registered in opencode-plugin.ts tool array
Default agent fallback uses config-records.ts, not hardcoded 'hivefiver'

delegation_packet.constraints: Do NOT modify existing tool registrations. Add 3 new entries. Do NOT change hook wiring. Preserve all existing hook behavior. The default agent fallback change must maintain backward compatibility.

phases.title: Implement configuration group logic
phases.description: Implement the 4 configuration groups: language (communication + document), expertise (level + style), governance (4 levels with halt-investigate-propose), operation mode (iterative-interactive / research-first / yolo). Each group is independently configurable via hm-setting. Create config-groups.ts with group definitions, validation, and serialization. Wire into hm-setting tool.
success_criteria: 4 configuration groups defined: language, expertise, governance, operation
Expert level enum: beginner, intermediate, advanced, expert
Governance levels defined with halt-investigate-propose behavior
Operation mode enum: iterative-interactive, research-first, yolo
hm-setting tool can configure individual groups or all
Unit tests cover all group validation rules

delegation_packet.constraints: Governance levels must NOT include auto-block. Use halt-investigate-propose pattern only. Expert levels must map to communication styles. Config groups must serialize to JSON for .hivemind/config/ persistence.

phases.title: Implement tiered conditional skill injection
phases.description: Implement two-tier conditional injection. Tier 1: project initiation with core docs (loaded on first session, includes use-hivemind, use-hivemind-context, use-hivemind-planning). Tier 2: planning & execution (loaded on task-classification basis). Per-agent, per-phase, per-task-classification rules with mandatory + high-likelihood skills. Wire into skill-exposure-map.ts resolveSkillBundle().
success_criteria: Tier 1 skills: use-hivemind, use-hivemind-context, use-hivemind-planning (mandatory on init)
Tier 2 skills: conditional on task classification (tdd, research, planning, implementation, course-correction, gatekeeping)
Per-agent rules defined for all 10 agents
Per-phase rules defined (discovery, planning, implementation, verification)
Unit tests cover tier activation logic

delegation_packet.constraints: Tier 1 skills must be available on every session. Tier 2 activation depends on task classification, not session state. Preserve resolveSkillBundle() signature. MAX_SKILLS = 3 enforced per bundle.
delegation_packet.return_contract: files_modified, type_check_result, test_output, tier_1_count, tier_2_count, per_agent_rule_count

phases.title: Remove legacy CLI, false sync, and .opencode noise
phases.description: Remove all legacy CLI files identified as safe-to-remove by phase 02 audit. Remove the false sync that writes .opencode/plugins/ stub. Remove deprecated scripts. Remove .opencode/commands/ dev mirrors (hm-course-correct.md, hm-harness.md, hm-implement.md, hm-plan.md, hm-research.md, hm-tdd.md, hm-verify.md). Keep only hm-init.md, hm-doctor.md, hm-settings.md (aligned with new tool surface).
success_criteria: .opencode/commands/ reduced to 3 files: hm-init.md, hm-doctor.md, hm-settings.md
src/cli.ts preserved or updated to not reference removed files

delegation_packet.scope: 5 files for removal, .opencode/commands/ for selective cleanup
delegation_packet.constraints: Do NOT remove src/cli.ts if it has active consumers — update instead. Do NOT remove hm-init.md, hm-doctor.md, hm-settings.md from .opencode/commands/. Preserve package.json bin scripts if they reference hivemind-tools.cjs.

phases.title: Full verification gate
phases.gate: npx tsc --noEmit && npm test && npm run build
phases.description: Full verification: type check, test suite, build. Verify no hardcoded skill names remain. Verify no dead code in paths.ts. Verify 12 tools registered. Verify .opencode/commands/ has exactly 3 files. Verify schema-kernel has 3 new modules. Emit completion report.
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
npm test passes with all 34+ test files green
Zero hardcoded skill names in skill-exposure-map.ts (grep confirmation)
Zero dead exports in paths.ts (grep confirmation)

delegation_packet.scope: Full project — no files in scope, all verification
delegation_packet.constraints: Read-only verification. Do not modify files. Run all three gates. Grep for dead code patterns. Report pass/fail for each criterion.

edges.reason: Schema types extend clean shared module
Injection needs agent names from definitions
Tools use config-records types for validation
Plugin must import new tool creators
Config groups wired into hm-setting tool
Plugin must be updated before config group integration
Tier activation depends on config groups
Plugin wiring must be stable before CLI removal

on_failure.collect_evidence: Gather both return packets, identify real blocker
on_failure.re_decompose: Apply 6-step decomposition to failed slice alone
on_failure.split_heuristic: By authority surface → concern type → file cluster

decision_tree.external_dependency_blocker: Add dependency slice before failed slice
decision_tree.missing_context: Add read slice before the write slice

carry_forward: Skill injection: 20 hardcoded names, 11 non-existent, MAX_SKILLS=7 must become 3
Dead code: ARTIFACTS_DIR, CHECKPOINTS_DIR, STATE_FILES in paths.ts — 0 consumers
Legacy CLI: 8 files, 2329 lines total, bin/hivemind-tools.cjs is 1422 lines
Schema kernel: thin re-export from archive/schema-kernel/ — new modules go here (additive)
